<%*
/*
 * New recipe — Templater template for the grocery-agent authoring vault.
 *
 * Applied automatically when you create a note in `recipes/` (folder template), or
 * insert it from the Templater command. It scaffolds ONLY the human-authored recipe
 * frontmatter (the src/recipe-contract.js required set) plus the body sections the
 * cookbook renders. It deliberately OMITS `description` — that field is generated by
 * the Worker from the recipe's facets (stored in D1, merged on read), so no human
 * authors it; adding one here would be ignored by the importer.
 *
 * Fill the controlled-vocabulary facets (course / protein / cuisine / season /
 * requires_equipment) from the Properties dropdowns the `recipe` fileClass provides —
 * they are constrained to src/vocab.js, so an off-vocab value is not offered.
 */
-%>
---
title: "<% tp.file.title %>"
course: []
protein: null
cuisine: null
time_total: null
source: null
ingredients_key: []
dietary: []
season: []
requires_equipment: []
tags: []
pairs_with: []
perishable_ingredients: []
side_search_terms: []
---

## Ingredients

- 

## Instructions

1.
